headlines.title: Is Starmer's leadership under serious threat?
headlines.description: Downing Street is trying to ignore the challenge from a former minister, but it has raised eyebrows around Westminster.

headlines.title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
headlines.description: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

headlines.title: Spain starts evacuating virus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife
headlines.description: Spanish passengers are the first leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

headlines.title: Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different
headlines.description: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.

headlines.title: Teachers in England to vote on striking over pay
headlines.description: The National Education Union says it will hold a formal ballot this autumn without "urgent action".

headlines.title: Two men admit filming antisemitic abuse on TikTok
headlines.description: Adam Bedoui, 20, and Abdelkader Amir Bousloub, 21, travelled to a predominantly Jewish area to film antisemitic abuse.

headlines.title: How the winner-takes-all voting system has turned on Labour and the Tories
headlines.description: The first-past-the-post system favoured Reform in this English local elections

headlines.title: How Reform won votes from Swansea to Sunderland
headlines.description: Many voters have turned to Reform UK with devastating consequences for the main two parties, Labour and the Conservatives.

headlines.title: What does Plaid Cymru's Rhun ap Iorwerth do next after election victory?
headlines.description: Plaid forged a stunning election victory, and its leader's thoughts are now on building a government.

headlines.title: Our relationship with food is messed up - let's sort it out, says Stanley Tucci
headlines.description: The new season of Tucci in Italy sees the actor travel the country finding out why there's a lot more to food than you might think.

headlines.title: Another year, another controversy for Eurovision - but fans are sticking by it
headlines.description: Fans are grappling with how to react to the withdrawal of Spain, Ireland and others over Israel's participation.

headlines.title: Adolescence, Amandaland and Traitors stars ready for Bafta TV Awards
headlines.description: Big names and rising stars will be honoured on the biggest night in the British TV calendar.

headlines.title: Lidl shoppers say they'll miss monthly freebies. Can bonus points win them over?
headlines.description: With food prices rising rapidly, do loyalty schemes still have any connection to loyalty?

headlines.title: Antisemitism 'a problem for all of us to fix', religious leaders say in letter
headlines.description: In recent months, there have been a string of attacks at synagogues and other Jewish sites.

headlines.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
headlines.description: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Plot to oust Starmer' and 'Gord help us all'
headlines.description: Sunday's papers lead on the fallout from the local elections and Gordon Brown's return to politics.

headlines.title: How could extreme weather affect World Cup 2026?
headlines.description: With almost a month to go until the start of the World Cup, Simon King looks ahead to the weather's potential to disrupt the tournament this summer.

headlines.title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
headlines.description: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.

headlines.title: Man arrested after car hit group in Nottinghamshire town
headlines.description: One person suffered life-threatening injuries and four others were hurt in the incident.

headlines.title: Gousto packager sacked for eating stolen peanuts
headlines.description: Barbara Lisowska, 65, is fired for gross misconduct after the incident in Warrington, Cheshire.

headlines.title: Riverdale actor calls out TikTok singer Mr Fantasy - but is it all a ruse?
headlines.description: The actor has branded the singer an identity thief - but plenty of fans think they're the same person.

headlines.title: Dog found in cramped room with 250 others thriving in new home
headlines.description: Poodle-cross Winston was found crammed in a filthy living room with the other dogs and rescued by the RSPCA.

headlines.title: Mischief Managed: Harry Potter stars reunite for 25th anniversary
headlines.description: Some of the Weasley family visit the film's set to celebrate 25 years since the first movie, Harry Potter And The Philosopher's Stone.

headlines.title: Widow of footballer Joe Thompson pregnant with his child after IVF
headlines.description: Chantelle Thompson, who already has two children with the late footballer, says it is "bittersweet but beautiful news".

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Electioncast: The winners and the losers
headlines.description: Labour suffers historic losses across UK elections.

headlines.title: Trump takes his revenge on disloyal Republicans
headlines.description: The US president targets his political enemies in Kentucky and Indiana

headlines.title: Fast-paced, witty and smart coming-of-age comedy
headlines.description: Two booksmart girls try to cram in four years of fun on the eve of their graduation.

headlines.title: An insight into the secretive 'matchstick men' painter
headlines.description: The secretive artist revealed as never before, with his voice lip-synced by Ian McKellen.

headlines.title: Defiant Dubois sheds quitter tag to write new narrative
headlines.description: Daniel Dubois faced questions over his heart and mentality before facing Fabio Wardley, but silenced his critics by overcoming adversity to become WBO heavyweight champion.

headlines.title: Would Old Firm derby win be Rangers' 'trophy' this season?
headlines.description: Rangers manager Danny Rohl is under pressure after their title bid wilted - so an Old Firm win against Celtic on Sunday would be a timely tonic.

headlines.title: Boos, no intensity and no identity - what is Slot's Liverpool?
headlines.description: More boos at Anfield highlight why Liverpool must change their style during a seismic summer for Arne Slot.

headlines.title: Four-try Packer 'doesn't go away' as England set up Grand Slam decider
headlines.description: Four-try veteran flanker Marlie Packer "doesn't go away" as she eyes a fitting England finale in Bordeaux's Women's Six Nations Grand Slam decider.

headlines.title: Hearts fans drunk on drama as intoxicating title race takes twist
headlines.description: Hearts' mentality monsters dig deep for a point in a frenetic game at Motherwell that sums up this Scottish Premiership title race for the ages.

headlines.title: Fitzpatrick surges into lead as McIlroy falters
headlines.description: Alex Fitzpatrick hits a sparkling seven-under-par 64 to seize a one-shot lead heading into the final round of the Truist Championship at Quail Hollow.
